steps.title: Find the sentence boundary
steps.content: The first clause ends after Mission STS-53. The following words introduce a new sentence with the phrase 'Lasting seven days and seven hours' before the main clause 'the mission ended.'

steps.title: Reject faulty joins
steps.content: Choice A creates a comma splice with a participial phrase attached incorrectly. Choice B joins independent clauses with only a comma. Choice C fuses the mission name and participial phrase without a clear boundary. The remaining choice uses a period, then a valid introductory phrase. The answer is D.
